info.name: Paystack Verification API
info.description:
Identity, BVN, account number, card BIN, country, bank, and address-verification lookups used to validate customers, banks, and cards before transacting.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paystack Support
 Email: support@paystack.com

urlencoded.description: (Required) You can get the list of banks codes by calling the List Bank endpoint
